_about: Character translation mapping, keyed by cid (char-DB 0xDCF18) and idn = cid*3+slot (ID-command table 0xEC994); geometry in utils/extract/layout.py. detail_offsets re-aim slots of the 256-entry effect-detail offset table (didx); detail text bytes live in data/zh/placements/idcmd_detail_pool.json. Bark/bio text is mapped per bank under data/zh/files/ (keys pair with data/jp/characters.json).
